ValidationRule.description: Prevents a Job Position from being opened manually when required publishing fields are missing or the application deadline is expired.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Open"), OR( ISBLANK(Title__c), ISBLANK(Portal_Description__c), ISBLANK(Application_Deadline__c), Application_Deadline__c < TODAY() ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A Job Position cannot be opened unless Title, Portal Description, and a valid Application Deadline are filled.
